sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75868" key="ou)lofuh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐλοφῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὖλος</foreign> A) <sense id="n75868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rough, raw, undifferentiated</tr_>, of lumps of earth (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τύποι χθονός</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:62:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
